us_markets.note: Monday May 18 — Dow futures down 350+ pts. S&P 500 session close ~7421 (+0.16%). Bond rout deepens.

sp500.note: Rallied slightly from Friday's selloff. Still off all-time high 7517.

dow.note: Futures down ~350 pts on session. Rising yields pressuring.

nasdaq.note: Tech mixed — Nvidia earnings Wednesday crucial. Meta laying off staff.

10y_treasury_yield.note: Touched highest in a year. Global bond selloff continuing. Japan 30Y hit record.

wti_crude.note: Slipped from morning peak of $106. Still elevated on Iran-Hormuz risk.

brent_crude.note: Brent ~$111 at Asian open. Middle East risk premium baked in.

gold.note: Continued pullback from record $4,562. Strong dollar weighing.

usd_cny.note: CNY near 6.817. Stable despite risk-off tone.

us_markets.key_story: Monday sees global bond rout deepen — 10Y Treasury touched 1-year high, Japan 30Y hit record. Dow futures down 350+ as oil and yields pile pressure. NextEra Energy buying Dominion for $67B to create utility/ power-AI colossus. Meta layoffs starting this week marking harsh AI reality. Nvidia earnings Wednesday is the week's defining event. Kevin Warsh incoming Fed chair faces rate-cut vs inflation dilemma. Iran-US stalemate keeps Hormuz risk premium intact.

earnings: Nvidia (Wed — most important AI earnings of the quarter)
week_ahead.fed_watch: Warsh's first major test — rate cut outlook vs sticky inflation debate

shanghai_composite.note: Flat session. Markets cautious on Taiwan ambiguity post Trump-Xi.

hsi.note: Closed lower. Financials weak, oil stocks rose. Opened 25839, low 25505.

crypto.note: Crypto continues to slide with risk-off. BTC below $78K. ETH below $2,150. Market cap eroding amid rate fears.

wti_crude.trend: Slipped from morning high of $106 but elevated on Iran-US Hormuz risk

brent_crude.trend: Global benchmark ~$111. Middle East uncertainty persists.
